description: EasyPicker MySQL 完整期望结构；漂移检测与导出的 DDL 以此为唯一数据源（需与 docs/sql/auto_create.sql 保持语义一致）。
exportHeader: -- EasyPicker canonical schema（可整段复制到新库执行）

tables.name: category
tables.createOptions: ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COMMENT='任务分类'

columns.name: id
columns.ddl: `id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '主键自增'

columns.name: name
columns.ddl: `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类名称'

columns.name: user_id
columns.ddl: `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属用户'

columns.name: k
columns.ddl: `k` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类唯一标识'

tables.name: files
tables.createOptions: ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COMMENT='用户提交的问题'

columns.name: id
columns.ddl: `id` int(11) NOT NULL

columns.name: task_key
columns.ddl: `task_key` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属任务'

columns.name: task_name
columns.ddl: `task_name` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '提交时的任务名称'

columns.name: category_key
columns.ddl: `category_key` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属分类'

columns.name: user_id
columns.ddl: `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属用户'

columns.name: name
columns.ddl: `name` varchar(1024) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件名'

columns.name: info
columns.ddl: `info` json DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '提交填写的信息（表单项 JSON）'

columns.name: hash
columns.ddl: `hash` varchar(512) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件hash'

columns.name: date
columns.ddl: `date` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '上传日期'

columns.name: size
columns.ddl: `size` bigint NOT NULL COMMENT '文件大小'

columns.name: people
columns.ddl: `people` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '人员姓名'

columns.name: origin_name
columns.ddl: `origin_name` varchar(1024) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '原文件名'

columns.name: del
columns.ddl: `del` tinyint(4) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否删除'

columns.name: oss_del_time
columns.ddl: `oss_del_time` TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'oss资源删除时间'

columns.name: del_time
columns.ddl: `del_time` TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '删除时间'

columns.name: last_update_time
columns.ddl: `last_update_time` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后更新时间'

tables.name: people
tables.createOptions: ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COMMENT='任务关联人员表'

columns.name: id
columns.ddl: `id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '主键'

columns.name: task_key
columns.ddl: `task_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '关联任务id'

columns.name: user_id
columns.ddl: `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属用户id'

columns.name: name
columns.ddl: `name` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '人员姓名'

columns.name: status
columns.ddl: `status` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否提交'

columns.name: submit_date
columns.ddl: `submit_date` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后提交时间'

columns.name: submit_count
columns.ddl: `submit_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0'

columns.name: id
columns.ddl: `id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '主键'

columns.name: user_id
columns.ddl: `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '所属用户id'

columns.name: category_key
columns.ddl: `category_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '关联分类key'

columns.name: name
columns.ddl: `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务名称'

columns.name: k
columns.ddl: `k` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务唯一标识'

columns.name: del
columns.ddl: `del` tinyint(4) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否删除'

tables.name: task_info
tables.createOptions: ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COMMENT='任务附加属性'

columns.name: id
columns.ddl: `id` int(11) NOT NULL

columns.name: user_id
columns.ddl: `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '关联user_id'

columns.name: task_key
columns.ddl: `task_key` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '关联任务的key'

columns.name: template
columns.ddl: `template` varchar(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模板文件名称'

columns.name: rewrite
columns.ddl: `rewrite` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '自动重命名'

columns.name: format
columns.ddl: `format` varchar(1024) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件名格式'

columns.name: info
columns.ddl: `info` json DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '提交必填的内容(表单结构 JSON)'

columns.name: ddl
columns.ddl: `ddl` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '截止日期'

columns.name: share_key
columns.ddl: `share_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务对外分享短链 key（与 task.k 不同；公开分享页等使用）'

columns.name: limit_people
columns.ddl: `limit_people` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否限制提交人员'

columns.name: tip
columns.ddl: `tip` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT '批注信息（含 emoji）'

columns.name: bind_field
columns.ddl: `bind_field` varchar(255) DEFAULT '姓名' COMMENT '绑定表单字段'

columns.name: id
columns.ddl: `id` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '唯一标识'

columns.name: account
columns.ddl: `account` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '用于登录的账号'

columns.name: phone
columns.ddl: `phone` varchar(22) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '手机号'

columns.name: password
columns.ddl: `password` varchar(256) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码'

columns.name: power
columns.ddl: `power` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '6' COMMENT '账户权限'

columns.name: status
columns.ddl: `status` tinyint(4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '账户权限'

columns.name: join_time
columns.ddl: `join_time` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间'

columns.name: login_time
columns.ddl: `login_time` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间'

columns.name: login_count
columns.ddl: `login_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '登陆次数'

columns.name: open_time
columns.ddl: `open_time` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '解封时间'

columns.name: size
columns.ddl: `size` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '可支配空间上限GB'

columns.name: wallet
columns.ddl: `wallet` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2.00' COMMENT '钱包余额'

postStatements: ALTER TABLE `category` MODIFY `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键自增';
ALTER TABLE `files` MODIFY `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT;
ALTER TABLE `people` MODIFY `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键';
ALTER TABLE `task` MODIFY `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键';
ALTER TABLE `task_info` MODIFY `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT;
ALTER TABLE `user` MODIFY `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '唯一标识';
